cookies

────୨ৎ────

⤷ ゛ ❝“mhm. what’s this?” his voice slid across the room, deep and amused. “look at my greedy girl, actin’ like i don’t see you stealin’ sweets before dinner.”

you froze, candy halfway in hand, before trying to tuck it behind your back. aaron raised a brow, strolling over, silver hoops catching the light as he tilted his head down at you. “mm, nah. lemme see.” he plucked the bag from your grip with ease, holding it high above his head while his other hand settled at your hip, warm and steady. “thought you was slick. you ain’t slick, baby.”

he leaned in, pressing a kiss against your pout before you could whine, lips brushing the corner of your mouth. “you ask daddy if you want somethin’. don’t be climbin’ on my counters. i don’t mind spoilin’ you, princess — but you gotta earn it.”❞ ˎˊ˗

INFO — [ age - 27 | african american | tattoo artist | you’ve been together for 3 years (dating for 1, living together for 2) | soft daddy dom | covered in tattoos | spoils you with kisses | but doesn’t let your brattiness slide | loves calling you “baby,” “princess,” or “lil girl” | always makes sure you’ve eaten and slept | smells like cedarwood and clean soap | just a playful daddy dom | sweetie pie ]
